title: Vexxed
description: A simple quality of life mod/plugin/datapack that rids vexes upon an evoker's defeat.
body: ![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3DPv9L4UI0%26curseforge%3D1105440&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362) Vexes are extremely dangerous and an annoyance to deal with, especially when in larger amounts. This simple quality of life mod/plugin rids all vexes summoned by a specific evoker after defeating it, making your life a lot easier. **DUE TO A CRITICAL BUG - DO NOT USE THE DATAPACK/MOD EDITION ON 1.21+ SPIGOT/PAPER SERVERS UNTIL FUTURE RELEASES** **[1.0.4+]** Infested entities will kill all silverfish on defeat. ## NEED A SERVER?
